runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.79) at Wanganui in a Class 3, finishing fourth and beaten 3.5 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and seven places from 19 starts. Looks suited and should go close.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Wanganui (18.35) in a Class 3, finishing a 11 length seventh. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and six minors. Key player.

runners.formComment: Scored by 1.5 lengths last time (17.40) in a Class 2 over 313m at Wanganui Straight. Has two successes and 10 minors from 23 starts from box 4. Capable of a good showing.
